response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and architectural skills. However, the role strictly requires 8 years of C++ programming experience, which he lacks, having primarily worked with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with only 7 months of professional C++ experience listed. Despite his leadership and cloud infrastructure background, this critical technical gap makes him unsuitable for this specific compute platform role.
strengths: Extensive experience designing and scaling distributed systems and microservices architectures handling high traffic.
Proven technical leadership and mentoring capabilities, demonstrated through Staff-level roles and conducting technical workshops.
Strong background in modern cloud infrastructure, containerization (Kubernetes, Docker), and DevOps practices.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the 8-year minimum requirement for C++ programming, a core technical competency for this role.
Recent technical experience is heavily skewed towards web-stack languages (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than low-level compute platform languages.
Lacks explicit experience leading specialized cloud compute hardware or low-level storage architecture teams.
